name: Twilio SMS
description: Send SMS messages and inspect recent Twilio messages through a guarded MCP interface.

secrets.name: TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID
secrets.label: Twilio Account SID
secrets.description: Account SID from the Twilio Console.

secrets.name: TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN
secrets.label: Twilio Auth Token
secrets.description: Auth token from the Twilio Console. Optional if using API key SID/secret.

secrets.name: TWILIO_API_KEY_SID
secrets.label: Twilio API Key SID
secrets.description: Optional API Key SID. Use with TWILIO_API_KEY_SECRET instead of Auth Token.

secrets.name: TWILIO_API_KEY_SECRET
secrets.label: Twilio API Key Secret
secrets.description: Optional API Key secret. Use with TWILIO_API_KEY_SID instead of Auth Token.

secrets.name: TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER
secrets.label: Twilio From Number
secrets.description: Default E.164 sender phone number for outbound SMS.

secrets.name: TWILIO_MESSAGING_SERVICE_SID
secrets.label: Twilio Messaging Service SID
secrets.description: Optional Messaging Service SID to use instead of a from number.
